title: Verify existing implementation of notification formatter
description: The notification formatter with templates for 'enrollment', 'grade', and 'reminder' already exists in src/services/notification-formatter.ts. Tests pass (8/8) covering all three notification types with full data, defaults for missing optional fields, and null return for unknown types.
existing_patterns: src/services/*.test.ts - co-located test files with vitest
src/services/quiz-grader.ts - simple pure function service pattern
